title: Lesson Progress Tracker
description: Machine-readable, kanban-style progress for one topic's lesson series. Lives at topics/<topic>/progress.json. The hand-written narrative index is SERIES.md; this is the structured source of truth that gates Definition of Done. Update it at the START (status/cursor) and END (artifacts/status) of every lesson.

topic.description: Topic slug, matches the folder under topics/.

updated.description: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) this file was last updated.

mode.description: e.g. 'build-along · delegated build (educate specs → build implements)'.

humanIndex.description: Path to the hand-written narrative index (SERIES.md).

build.description: Where the delegated build lives, if this is a build-along topic.

lifecycle.description: Ordered status ladder a lesson moves through.

lifecycleNotes.description: One-line meaning of each lifecycle state.

definitionOfDone.description: What must exist for a lesson to be 'done'. `gates` are the rules that prevent silent drift.

cursor.description: Where the series actually is right now and what happens next. Read this first when resuming.

artifacts.description: Existence map per artifact. Gates 'done': all true (for the lesson's mode) AND verified on disk.

handoff.description: Delegated-build EVIDENCE (durable, tracked). The SPEC and findings payloads themselves are transient in a gitignored .handoff/; these booleans are the record the DoD gate reads (see the praxisflux handoff protocol).

specd.description: A SPEC was handed to the build plugin.

foldedIn.description: The return leg was folded back into the lesson (durable residue in guide/raw-notes).

buildIncrement.description: What the build does this lesson.

motivator.description: Why this lesson exists / the failure it fixes.

feedsForward.description: What it sets up for later lessons.

gotchas.description: Live build findings / things that bit us — the highest-value meta to carry forward.
